visual_mood: Close-up hero shot with one feature magnified -- the polarized lens is the star, shown in a zoomed inset circle

layout.composition: Product fills 70% of the frame on a dark wooden surface, slightly angled. A circular magnification inset in the upper-right shows a close-up of the polarized lens. Headline at top-left. Small feature description near the inset. Logo bottom-right.
layout.text_hierarchy: Headline large, feature label medium, description small
layout.background: Dark wooden surface, warm side lighting, shallow depth of field

text_elements.content: Eliminates 99% of horizontal glare for crystal-clear vision

product.placement: Only ONE pair. Large in the frame on dark wooden surface, angled to show the lens prominently. A circular zoom inset in the upper-right magnifies the lens detail.
product.instruction: Only ONE pair of sunglasses matching the reference image. Real glossy sunglasses with natural reflections. The magnification inset shows a close-up of the lens surface.

brand.color_scheme: Warm dark wood, white text, thin red circle outline for the magnification inset

prompt: A close-up product photograph of ONE pair of Bandits Green sunglasses from DuberyMNL on a dark wooden surface with warm side lighting -- real glossy sunglasses matching the reference image, filling 70% of the frame. A circular magnification inset with a thin red outline in the upper-right corner shows a zoomed detail of the polarized lens surface. White headline 'LOOK CLOSER' at top-left in the bold italic sporty typeface from the font reference. Label 'POLARIZED TAC LENS' near the inset with description 'Eliminates 99% of horizontal glare for crystal-clear vision' below. DuberyMNL logo bottom-right. 4:5 aspect ratio, premium product photography.
